name: Peach Crumble Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the temperature specified in the no-roll pie shell recipe.
2. Prepare the no-roll pie shell according to the instructions provided.
3. In a bowl, mix together diced peaches and sugar until combined.
4. Pour the peach mixture into the prepared pie shell.
5. Sprinkle crumble topping over the filling.
6. Place the pie in the preheated oven.
7. Bake for the time specified in the no-roll pie shell recipe.
8. Remove the pie from the oven when done and allow it to cool completely.
9. Turn off the heat and let the pie cool before serving.
